vocab.meaning: đô thị toàn bê tông (nghĩa tiêu cực về sự thiếu mảng xanh)
vocab.example: Living in the heart of the city means being surrounded by a concrete jungle of skyscrapers.
Several new apartment complexes have recently been built, and they unfortunately obstruct the view of the mountains.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường là tự phát và dày đặc)
vocab.example: The rapid urban sprawl in my area has led to the emergence of numerous high-density tower blocks.

vocab.meaning: những tòa nhà cao vút, đồ sộ
vocab.example: From my balcony, I can see several soaring edifices that house the headquarters of major banks.

vocab.meaning: làm cho môi trường xung quanh trở nên nhỏ bé
vocab.example: The new 60-story landmark building completely dwarfs the surroundings, including the old two-story houses.

vocab.meaning: bất động sản cao tầng (hoặc giá cao ngất ngưởng)
vocab.example: My neighborhood is becoming famous for its sky-high real estate, with luxury penthouses overlooking the river.
There is a twisting glass tower nearby that is considered an architectural marvel by many locals.

vocab.meaning: rất gần, cách một quãng ngắn
vocab.example: Just a stone's throw away from my doorstep, there is a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers.

vocab.meaning: phức hợp thương mại (thường là các tòa nhà cao tầng)
vocab.example: The local skyline is dominated by a massive commercial complex that includes offices and a five-star hotel.

vocab.meaning: thống trị/nổi bật nhất trong khung cảnh
vocab.example: These metallic skyscrapers truly dominate the landscape, especially when they are illuminated at night.
